title: No automatic eligibility decisions
explanation: Assessment and graph evidence cannot automatically decide eligibility or reduce support.

title: Participant confirmation for service plans
explanation: Service plans and bookings require explicit participant confirmation.

title: Scoped consent for data sharing
explanation: Only minimum necessary data may be shared with explicit consent scope.

title: Safeguarding escalation
explanation: Safeguarding signals pause normal booking flow and require human review.

title: Credential check for manual handling
explanation: Workers must have verified credentials before manual handling supports.

title: AI outputs are draft-only
explanation: AI-generated support suggestions remain drafts until participant confirms.
